documents.title: Email: Project Status Meeting Request
documents.body:
From: alan.parker@greenleafmedia.com
To: design-team@greenleafmedia.com
Subject: Project Status Meeting - Waterford Campaign

Team,

We need to review the Waterford campaign progress before the client presentation next Friday. I have scheduled a meeting for Tuesday, March 4, from 10:00 AM to 11:30 AM. Please see the attached agenda and confirm your attendance.

Key topics will include the design mockups, the revised budget, and the media buying schedule. Kendra, please bring the updated cost projections. Marcus, I need your analytics report on the test campaign.

The client has specifically requested to see at least three design concepts, so please make sure those are ready.

Regards,
Alan Parker
Creative Director

documents.title: Meeting Agenda
documents.body:
WATERFORD CAMPAIGN - STATUS MEETING AGENDA
Date: Tuesday, March 4
Time: 10:00 AM - 11:30 AM
Location: Conference Room 2B

Agenda Items:
1. Review of design mockups - Lisa Tran (15 min)
2. Budget update and revised cost projections - Kendra Walsh (10 min)
3. Analytics report on test campaign - Marcus Chen (15 min)
4. Media buying schedule - David Park (10 min)
5. Client presentation rehearsal - All (20 min)
6. Q&A and next steps - Alan Parker (10 min)

Attendees: Alan Parker, Lisa Tran, Kendra Walsh, Marcus Chen, David Park

Materials to bring:
- Updated design files (Lisa)
- Cost projection spreadsheet (Kendra)
- Analytics dashboard printouts (Marcus)
- Media plan calendar (David)

documents.title: Room Booking Confirmation
documents.body:
ROOM BOOKING CONFIRMATION

Booking Reference: RM-2025-0892
Booked by: Alan Parker
Room: Conference Room 2B, 2nd Floor
Date: Tuesday, March 4, 2025
Time: 10:00 AM - 11:30 AM
Capacity: 8 people

Equipment available:
- Projector with HDMI connection
- Whiteboard (markers provided)
- Conference phone

Catering: Coffee and tea service has been ordered for 10:00 AM. Pastries for 6 people.

Please note: The room must be vacated by 11:30 AM as another meeting is scheduled at 12:00 PM.

For any changes, contact facilities@greenleafmedia.com at least 24 hours in advance.

questions.question: When is the client presentation scheduled?
questions.explanation: Alan的郵件寫道「before the client presentation next Friday」，會議在3月4日（週二），因此客戶簡報在下週五3月7日。

questions.question: Who is responsible for the analytics report?
questions.explanation: 會議議程第三項列出「Analytics report on test campaign - Marcus Chen」。

questions.question: What equipment is available in the meeting room?
options: A projector, whiteboard, and conference phone
questions.answer: A projector, whiteboard, and conference phone
questions.explanation: 會議室預訂確認中列出「Projector with HDMI connection, Whiteboard, Conference phone」。

questions.question: How many attendees are expected at the meeting?
questions.explanation: 此題須同時參照兩篇以上文件：會議議程列出5位與會者（Alan, Lisa, Kendra, Marcus, David），而會議室容量為8人，備有6人份茶點，但議程中的出席名單確認為5人。

questions.question: What should attendees do after the meeting ends at 11:30 AM?
options: Set up for the next meeting
questions.explanation: 會議室預訂確認中提醒「The room must be vacated by 11:30 AM as another meeting is scheduled at 12:00 PM」。

documents.title: Purchase Order
documents.body:
PURCHASE ORDER #PO-8890
Date: March 10, 2025
Buyer: Oakwood Elementary School
Supplier: SmartClass Equipment Co.

Items:
1. Interactive Whiteboards (Model IW-70) - Qty: 4 - $1,200 each
2. Document Cameras (Model DC-300) - Qty: 4 - $350 each
3. Student Response Systems (Model RS-100) - Qty: 30 - $45 each

Subtotal: $7,550

Shipping: $250

Delivery Address: Oakwood Elementary School, 450 Maple Avenue, Springfield, IL 62701
Requested delivery date: April 15, 2025

Payment Terms: Net 30 days from delivery

documents.title: Invoice
documents.body:
INVOICE #SC-2025-431

From: SmartClass Equipment Co.
To: Oakwood Elementary School

Items Billed:
1. Interactive Whiteboards (Model IW-70) - Qty: 4 - $1,200 each - $4,800
2. Document Cameras (Model DC-300) - Qty: 4 - $350 each - $1,400
3. Student Response Systems (Model RS-100) - Qty: 30 - $45 each - $1,350

Subtotal: $7,550

Shipping: $250
Installation Fee: $300

Payment due by: April 11, 2025
Please remit payment to:
SmartClass Equipment Co.
Account #8856-9921-0042
Routing #021000021

documents.title: Delivery Schedule Notice
documents.body:
DELIVERY SCHEDULE
Order Reference: PO #PO-8890
Customer: Oakwood Elementary School

Your order has been processed and will be delivered as follows:

Delivery 1 (April 8, 2025):
- Document Cameras (DC-300) - Qty: 4
- Student Response Systems (RS-100) - Qty: 30

Delivery 2 (April 14, 2025):
- Interactive Whiteboards (IW-70) - Qty: 4

A certified technician will arrive on April 14 at 1:00 PM to install the interactive whiteboards. Please ensure someone is available to provide access to the classrooms where the whiteboards will be installed. The installation is expected to take approximately 4 hours.

If you have any questions about your delivery, please call our logistics team at 1-800-555-0312.

questions.question: What is the unit price of one document camera?
questions.explanation: 採購單中Document Cameras的單價為$350。

questions.question: What additional charge appears on the invoice that is not on the purchase order?
questions.explanation: 發票中有一筆「Installation Fee: $300」，此項目在採購單中未出現。

questions.question: When will the interactive whiteboards be delivered?
questions.explanation: 出貨排程中Delivery 2標示Interactive Whiteboards於April 14送達。

questions.question: How long is the installation expected to take?
questions.explanation: 出貨通知提到「installation is expected to take approximately 4 hours」。

questions.question: What is the difference between the total amount on the purchase order and the invoice?
questions.explanation: 此題須同時參照兩篇以上文件：採購單總額為$8,404，發票總額為$8,704，兩者差額$300即為發票多出的安裝費（Installation Fee）。

documents.title: Job Posting: Customer Service Manager
documents.body:
Skyline Telecom is seeking a Customer Service Manager for our Dallas call center.

Key Responsibilities:
- Supervise a team of 15 customer service representatives
- Monitor call quality and conduct weekly performance reviews
- Handle escalated customer complaints
- Develop training materials for new hires

Requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Business or related field
- Minimum 3 years of customer service experience
- At least 1 year in a supervisory role
- Bilingual in English and Spanish preferred

We offer:
- Salary: $62,000 - $68,000 per year
- Medical, dental, and vision insurance
- 401(k) with company match

To apply, submit your resume to careers@skyline.com by March 31.

documents.title: Resume: Angela Rodriguez
documents.body:
ANGELA RODRIGUEZ
ar.rodriguez@email.com | (214) 555-0147 | Dallas, TX

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Customer service professional with 5 years of experience in call center environments. Fluent in English and Spanish.

WORK EXPERIENCE

Team Lead, Customer Service - Horizon Communications, Dallas, TX
March 2022 - Present (3 years)
- Supervised a team of 10 representatives
- Reduced average call handling time by 15%
- Conducted monthly performance evaluations
- Assisted in developing training programs for new employees

Customer Service Representative - Horizon Communications, Dallas, TX
June 2020 - February 2022 (1 year 8 months)
- Handled 60+ customer calls daily
- Achieved 98% customer satisfaction rating
- Trained 5 new team members

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Arts in Communications - University of Texas at Dallas, 2020

SKILLS
- Bilingual: English and Spanish
- CRM Software: Salesforce, Zendesk
- Microsoft Office Suite

documents.title: Interview Invitation Email
documents.body:
From: hr@skyline.com
To: ar.rodriguez@email.com
Subject: Interview Invitation - Customer Service Manager Position

Dear Ms. Rodriguez,

Thank you for your application for the Customer Service Manager position. We were impressed by your qualifications and would like to invite you for an interview.

Interview Details:
Date: Monday, April 7, 2025
Time: 2:00 PM
Location: Skyline Telecom, 1200 Commerce Street, 8th Floor, Dallas, TX 75201

Your interview will be with Maria Santos, Director of Customer Operations, and James Lee, HR Manager. The interview is expected to last approximately 45 minutes. Please bring a copy of your resume and any relevant work samples.

Please confirm your availability by replying to this email by April 3.

We look forward to meeting you.

Best regards,
Skyline Telecom HR Department

questions.question: What is the salary range for the Customer Service Manager position?
questions.explanation: 招聘廣告明確列出「Salary: $62,000 - $68,000 per year」。

questions.question: How many years of supervisory experience does Angela Rodriguez have?
questions.explanation: 履歷顯示Angela自2022年3月至今（2025年3月）擔任Team Lead一職，共3年管理經驗。

questions.question: Who will conduct Angela's interview?
options: A panel of three team members
questions.explanation: 面試邀請信指出面試官為「Maria Santos, Director of Customer Operations, and James Lee, HR Manager」。

questions.question: When is the deadline for Angela to confirm her interview attendance?
questions.explanation: 面試邀請信要求「confirm your availability by replying to this email by April 3」。

questions.question: Based on all three documents, why is Angela a strong candidate for the position?
options: She has a master's degree in Business
She meets the experience, supervisory, and bilingual requirements listed in the job posting
She previously worked at Skyline Telecom
She has 10 years of customer service experience
questions.answer: She meets the experience, supervisory, and bilingual requirements listed in the job posting
questions.explanation: 此題須同時參照三篇文件：徵才廣告要求3年以上客服經驗、1年以上管理職、雙語能力為加分項；Angela的履歷顯示她有5年客服經驗、3年Team Lead管理經驗且雙語流利；面試邀請信證實她的資格受到認可。比對三份文件可知她符合所有核心條件。
